channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Jessica Sanchez returns to the Araneta Coliseum for a live concert
item.description: Filipino-American singer Jessica Sanchez recently held a highly anticipated concert at the Araneta Coliseum, also known as the Big Dome. The event marked a significant moment in her career, as she per...

item.title: Political Analyst Herman Manyora Alleges Hospital Disputes Contributed to Dr Job Obwaka’s Death
item.description: During Dr Job Obwaka's funeral in Shatsala village, Kakamega County, political analyst Herman Manyora made strong claims that the veteran medic's death was partly linked to internal problems at The Na...

item.title: Kaduna APC announces winners of House of Reps primaries, Abbas Tajudeen returns for fifth term
item.description: On Saturday, Kaduna State chapter of the All Progressives Congress (APC) officially released the results of its House of Representatives primary elections. Several prominent politicians and consensus ...

item.title: India to Host 2026 India-Africa Forum Summit in New Delhi to Boost Strategic Partnership
item.description: India will host the fourth India-Africa Forum Summit in New Delhi from 28 to 31 May 2026, aiming to deepen political, economic, and cultural connections with African nations. High Commissioner Prabhat...

item.title: Former Intelligence Official Criticizes Trump’s Approach to Chinese Cybersecurity Threats
item.description: Sue Gordon, former deputy director of national intelligence, expressed serious concern over President Donald Trump's remarks regarding Chinese cyberattacks and intellectual property theft following a ...

item.title: Punjab CM assures no genuine votes will be deleted in Special Intensive Revision
item.description: Punjab Chief Minister Bhagwant Mann has clarified that during the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of electoral rolls in Punjab, not a single genuine vote will be removed. He warned against attempts t...

item.title: US and Nigerian Forces Kill ISIS Senior Leader Abu-Bilal al-Minuki in Joint Operation
item.description: US and Nigerian forces conducted a joint operation that resulted in the death of Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, a senior ISIS leader, according to statements by US President Donald Trump and Nigerian officials....

item.title: Eurovision’s growing political tensions and historic boycotts amid the 2026 contest
item.description: The 2026 Eurovision Song Contest, marking its 70th anniversary in Vienna, is overshadowed by the largest boycott in its history, with Spain, the Netherlands, Ireland, Slovenia and Iceland withdrawing ...

item.title: The Life and Legacy of Milunka Savić, Serbia’s Most Decorated Female Soldier
item.description: Milunka Savić, born in Serbia, made history by disguising herself as a man to fight in the Balkan Wars when her brother was too ill to serve. She joined the Serbian army under the name Milun Savić, an...

item.title: Government restricts silver imports requiring authorisation to ease pressure on forex reserves
item.description: The Union Government has introduced fresh restrictions on silver imports by moving several categories of the metal from the 'free' to the 'restricted' list. As per the notification issued on Saturday,...

item.title: Bomai withdraws from Yobe governorship race to support APC consensus candidate
item.description: Senator Ibrahim Mohammed Bomai don officially withdraw himsef from the Yobe State governorship race after plenty consultations with party leaders, stakeholders, elders, and supporters all over the sta...

item.title: Trump and Xi Meet: Modest Advances in Trade and Diplomatic Relations
item.description: President Donald Trump concluded a two-day summit with Chinese leader Xi Jinping on May 15, 2026, in China, a meeting watched closely for signs of shifts in U.S.-China relations. Both leaders expresse...

item.title: Eskom plans structural repairs for Tutuka coal silos to ensure safety and reliability
item.description: Eskom has announced plans to carry out extensive repair work on the six coal silos at Tutuka power station after a thorough inspection revealed structural defects and material deterioration. The asses...

item.title: Alex Eala to begin Strasbourg WTA 500 journey against qualifier
item.description: Filipino tennis star Alex Eala is set to begin her campaign at the prestigious Strasbourg WTA 500 tournament by facing a qualifier in her opening match. The tournament, known for attracting top female...

item.title: Ndudi Elumelu Wins APC Primary for Oshimili South Federal Constituency, Defeats Incumbent Ngozi Okolie in Delta State
item.description: Na former Minority Leader of di House of Representatives, Ndudi Elumelu, don defeat di incumbent lawmaker, Ngozi Okolie, for di All Progressives Congress House of Representatives primary wey dem hold ...

item.title: Canada defeats Italy 6-0 in Men's Hockey World Championship with Celebrini scoring twice
item.description: Canada dominated Italy 6-0 in their second game of the Men's Hockey World Championship in Fribourg, Switzerland. Macklin Celebrini, the 19-year-old team captain, scored twice and added an assist, lead...

item.title: Karl P. Schmidt’s Detailed Account of His Fatal Boomslang Snake Bite
item.description: In 1957, Karl P. Schmidt, a prominent herpetologist, suffered a fatal bite from a juvenile boomslang snake while handling it at the Chicago Natural History Museum. Believing that a young, rear-fanged ...

item.title: German Chancellor Merz Advises Against His Children Moving to the U.S. Amid Social Concerns
item.description: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz recently expressed concerns about the current social and economic climate in the United States, telling an audience of young Catholics that he would not recommend his ...

item.title: Sue Ramirez shares thoughts on starting a family with Dominic Roque
item.description: In a recent interview, actress Sue Ramirez expressed her openness to starting a family with her longtime partner, Dominic Roque. The Filipino actress shared that while she and Dominic are focused on e...

item.title: David Masoko Explores Intimate and Ethical Street Photography
item.description: David Masoko’s series “Dislocated Presences” offers a fresh perspective on street photography by focusing on subtle gestures and transitional moments rather than traditional decisive scenes. Working i...
